abilities.name: Holy Light
abilities.description: Heals a friendly living unit or deals damage to an undead unit. Healing pierces spell immunity.

abilities.name: Divine Shield
abilities.description: Surrounds the Paladin with a divine shield, protecting him from all damage and spells.

abilities.name: Devotion Aura
abilities.description: Gives additional armor to nearby friendly units.

abilities.name: Resurrection
abilities.description: Brings back the corpses of nearby units.

abilities.name: Blizzard
abilities.description: Calls down waves of freezing ice shards that deal magic damage per 0.7 seconds to units in a target area. Friendly fire off.

abilities.name: Summon Water Elemental
abilities.description: Summons a Water Elemental to fight for the hero.

abilities.name: Brilliance Aura
abilities.description: Grants additional mana regeneration to nearby allies.

abilities.name: Mass Teleport
abilities.description: Teleports player's nearby units, including the Archmage, to a friendly ground unit or structure.

abilities.name: Storm Bolt
abilities.description: Slams a magical hammer at an enemy unit, dealing magic damage and stunning the target.

abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.description: Slams the ground, dealing magic damage to nearby enemy units and slowing their movement and attack speed.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.description: Gives a chance to stun and deal bonus magic damage on attack.

abilities.name: Avatar
abilities.description: Grants the Mountain King bonus HP, damage, armor and magic immunity.

abilities.name: Flame Strike
abilities.description: Conjures a pillar of fire which deals magic damage to units in a target area over time. Duration 3s burn / 6s total.

abilities.name: Banish
abilities.description: Sends a non-mechanical unit ethereal and slows its movement speed by 50%. Ethereal units take 66% more damage from magic. Cannot attack while ethereal.

abilities.name: Siphon Mana
abilities.description: Drains mana between the Blood Mage and a target. Can push the Blood Mage's mana over maximum.

abilities.name: Phoenix
abilities.description: Summons a powerful Phoenix with Magic Immunity and Resistant Skin. Burns with intensity that damages itself. Creates an egg when it dies that hatches into a new Phoenix.

abilities.name: Wind Walk
abilities.description: Allows the Blademaster to become invisible, move through units and move faster. Breaks invisibility and deals bonus damage on next attack.

abilities.name: Mirror Image
abilities.description: Creates illusions of the Blademaster. Illusions take extra damage and deal a percentage of the hero's original damage.

abilities.name: Critical Strike
abilities.description: Gives a 15% chance to do bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Bladestorm
abilities.description: Creates a tornado of destructive force around the Blademaster, granting him magic immunity. Deals universal damage to nearby enemy land units.

abilities.name: Chain Lightning
abilities.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning at a target enemy that jumps to nearby enemies, dealing magic damage. Each jump deals 10% less damage.

abilities.name: Far Sight
abilities.description: Reveals the area of the map that it is cast upon. Also reveals invisible units.

abilities.name: Feral Spirit
abilities.description: Summons Spirit Wolves to fight for the Far Seer.

abilities.name: Earthquake
abilities.description: Makes the ground tremble and break, causing universal damage per second to buildings and slowing units within the area of effect.

abilities.name: Shockwave
abilities.description: Sends a wave of force, causing magic damage to land units in a line.

abilities.name: War Stomp
abilities.description: Slams the ground, dealing magic damage and stunning nearby enemy land units.

abilities.name: Endurance Aura
abilities.description: Increases movement speed and attack rate of nearby friendly units.

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.description: When killed, the Tauren Chieftain will come back to life.

abilities.name: Healing Wave
abilities.description: Calls forth a wave of energy that heals a target and bounces to nearby friendlies. Each bounce restores 25% less hit points.

abilities.name: Hex
abilities.description: Transforms an enemy unit into a random critter. Hex disables all abilities, item usage, prevents attacking, and slows the unit to 150 movement speed.

abilities.name: Serpent Ward
abilities.description: Summons an immobile serpentine ward to fight for the Shadow Hunter. Has magic immunity.

abilities.name: Big Bad Voodoo
abilities.description: Makes all friendly units invulnerable in an area around the Shadow Hunter. Does not affect heroes. Channeling spell — cancel invulnerability.

abilities.name: Death Coil
abilities.description: Coil of death that can deal magic damage to an enemy unit or heal a friendly Undead or Demon unit. Healing pierces spell immunity.

abilities.name: Death Pact
abilities.description: Kills a target friendly unit, converting a percentage of its hit points to the Death Knight's hit points. Can also be used on living units.

abilities.name: Unholy Aura
abilities.description: Increases movement speed and life regeneration rate of nearby friendly units.

abilities.name: Animate Dead
abilities.description: Raises up to 6 units in a 900 area to fight for the hero. Raised units gain Chaos attack, bonus HP, bonus damage, and access to special abilities.

abilities.name: Frost Nova
abilities.description: Deals magic damage to enemy units in an area. Slows movement by 50% and attack rate by 25%.

abilities.name: Frost Armor
abilities.description: Creates a shield of frost around a target friendly unit. Adds armor and slows movement speed by 25% for melee attackers.

abilities.name: Dark Ritual
abilities.description: Sacrifices a target friendly unit to convert a percentage of its hit points into mana for the hero. Can also be used on living units.

abilities.name: Death and Decay
abilities.description: Channels universal damage to everything in a 200 area of effect. Also destroys trees.

abilities.name: Carrion Swarm
abilities.description: Sends a horde of bats dealing magic damage. Units with Drunken Haze take 50% extra damage.

abilities.name: Sleep
abilities.description: Puts a target enemy unit to sleep. A sleeping unit can be awoken by attacking it.

abilities.name: Vampiric Aura
abilities.description: Nearby friendly melee units gain hit points when they attack a target.

abilities.name: Inferno
abilities.description: Summons an Infernal down from the sky, dealing universal damage and stunning nearby enemy land units. Infernal fights for the Dreadlord.

abilities.name: Impale
abilities.description: Enchants the Crypt Lord with massive claws, shooting spiked tendrils out in a line that damage and hurl enemy ground units into the air.

abilities.name: Spiked Carapace
abilities.description: The Crypt Lord forms barbed layers of chitinous armor that return magic damage to nearby melee attackers.

abilities.name: Carrion Beetles
abilities.description: The Crypt Lord propagates 2 Carrion Beetles from each of its enemies. Beetles have Burrow and are permanent, but only a certain number can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Locust Swarm
abilities.description: Releases a swarm of angry locusts that bite and tear at nearby enemies. Each hit restores hit points to the Crypt Lord.

abilities.name: Entangling Roots
abilities.description: Causes the earth to burst from the ground, immobilizing and dealing magic damage to a target enemy unit.

abilities.name: Force of Nature
abilities.description: Causes trees to burst into Treants. Treants have Nature's Blessing and 41-43 damage.

abilities.name: Thorns Aura
abilities.description: Causes enemies to take a percentage of the melee damage they deal to nearby friendly units.

abilities.name: Tranquility
abilities.description: Summons rains of healing energy to pour down in a large area, healing friendly allied units.

abilities.name: Scout
abilities.description: Summons an Owl Scout that can see invisible units and be used to scout the map. Higher ranks summon stronger owls and eventually 2 at once.

abilities.name: Searing Arrows
abilities.description: Increases physical attack damage by adding fire. Allows firing beyond normal range. Does not stack with other Unique effects.

abilities.name: Trueshot Aura
abilities.description: Gives friendly nearby units bonus damage to their ranged attacks. Includes bonuses to primary attributes from items.

abilities.name: Starfall
abilities.description: Calls down waves of meteors dealing universal damage to all enemy units. Pierces spell immunity.

abilities.name: Mana Burn
abilities.description: Sends a bolt of negative energy that burns a target enemy's mana. Burned mana combusts, dealing magic damage equal to the amount burned.

abilities.name: Immolation
abilities.description: Engulfs the Demon Hunter in flames causing magic damage per 0.5s to nearby enemies. Drains mana until deactivated.

abilities.name: Evasion
abilities.description: Gives a percent chance to avoid physical attacks.

abilities.name: Metamorphosis
abilities.description: Transforms the Demon Hunter into a powerful Demon with bonus hit points.

abilities.name: Fan of Knives
abilities.description: The Warden releases a flurry of knives, causing enhanced physical damage to nearby enemies. Deals damage only to visible targets.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Short distance teleportation that allows the Warden to move in and out of combat or dodge certain abilities.

abilities.name: Shadow Strike
abilities.description: Hurls a poisoned dagger which deals initial enhanced damage and then deals magic damage over time. The poison slows the target's movement speed by 50% for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Vengeance
abilities.description: Summons an Avatar that summons up to 6 invulnerable spirits from nearby corpses to attack enemies. When the Avatar dies, the spirits vanish.

abilities.name: Forked Lightning
abilities.description: Calls forth a cone of lightning dealing magic damage to multiple targets.

abilities.name: Frost Arrows
abilities.description: Adds a cold effect to each attack causing bonus physical damage and slowing a target. Unique — does not stack with other Unique effects.

abilities.name: Mana Shield
abilities.description: Creates a shield that absorbs damage by using mana. Mana shield ignores Armor Type and Value.

abilities.name: Tornado
abilities.description: Summons a fierce controllable Tornado that slows enemy speed by 60%. Randomly tosses enemies into the air and deals magic damage to buildings.

abilities.name: Silence
abilities.description: Prevents all enemies in a target area from casting spells.

abilities.name: Black Arrow
abilities.description: Adds extra physical damage to attacks. Units killed by Black Arrow rise as skeletons. Unique — does not stack with other Unique effects.

abilities.name: Life Drain
abilities.description: Drains hit points from a target enemy and transfers them to the Dark Ranger. Provides 320 vision of target while channeling.

abilities.name: Charm
abilities.description: Takes permanent control of a target enemy unit. Cannot be used on Heroes or units with Resistant Skin.

abilities.name: Breath of Fire
abilities.description: Breathes a cone of fire at enemy units dealing magic damage. Units with Drunken Haze ignite and take additional magic damage over time.

abilities.name: Drunken Haze
abilities.description: Drenches enemy units in alcohol reducing movement speed and causing attacks to miss. When hit by Breath of Fire they ignite dealing magic damage over time.

abilities.name: Drunken Brawler
abilities.description: Gives a percent chance to avoid attacks and deal bonus critical hit damage on an attack.

abilities.name: Storm, Earth and Fire
abilities.description: Splits the Brewmaster into three elemental warriors for 30 seconds. If any survive until summoned time ends, the Brewmaster is reborn.

abilities.name: Soul Burn
abilities.description: Engulfs an enemy unit in magical flames which cause damage over time. Prevents spellcasting and reduces attack damage.

abilities.name: Summon Lava Spawn
abilities.description: Summons a Lava Spawn that splits into two healthy Lava Spawns when it dies.

abilities.name: Incinerate
abilities.description: Each attack is enhanced with living flames that add physical damage. The flames persist, dealing bonus magic damage over time, tripling on the third hit. Unique — does not stack with other Unique effects. Incinerated units leave no corpses.

abilities.name: Volcano
abilities.description: Forces the ground to erupt into a massive Volcano. Every 5 seconds a wave of molten rocks is hurled at nearby ground units and buildings, dealing universal damage and stunning for 1 second.

abilities.name: Rain of Fire
abilities.description: Calls down waves of fire that deals magic damage per wave and burns enemies for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Howl of Terror
abilities.description: A terrifying howl that causes nearby enemy units to flee and reduces their attack damage.

abilities.name: Cleaving Attack
abilities.description: Deals enhanced physical damage that splashes to nearby enemies. Splash damage ignores armor value.

abilities.name: Doom
abilities.description: Marks a target for manifestation of a Demon. The afflicted unit cannot cast spells and takes universal damage per second until it dies.

abilities.name: Summon Bear
abilities.description: Summons a powerful Bear to attack enemies. Bear gains Bash at rank 2 (25% chance, 25 bonus dmg, 2s stun).

abilities.name: Summon Quilbeast
abilities.description: Summons an agile Quilbeast to attack enemies. Has Quill Strike (AoE attacks). Gains Slam at rank 2 (40% attack speed +25% move speed for 10s).
abilities.summon_passive: Quill Strike — AoE damage on attacks
abilities.summon_passive_rank2: Slam — 40% attack rate + 25% move speed for 10s

abilities.name: Summon Hawk
abilities.description: Summons a Thunder Hawk to spy on enemies. Hawk has Sight and Invisibility. Gains True Sight at rank 2 (reveals invisible units).
abilities.summon_passive_rank2: True Sight — reveals nearby invisible units

abilities.name: Stampede
abilities.description: Calls down hordes of rampaging thunder lizards to stomp the Beastmaster's enemies. Each exploding lizard deals universal damage.

abilities.name: Goblin Factory
abilities.description: Creates a factory which automatically constructs Clockwork Goblins. Goblins deal bonus damage to mechanical units and explode on death.

abilities.name: Cluster Rockets
abilities.description: Bombards an area with rockets dealing magic damage and stunning enemies. Also hits mechanicals and buildings.

abilities.name: Engineering Upgrade
abilities.description: With every second level increases the Pocket Factory output and gives bonus damage to the Tinker.

abilities.name: Robo-Goblin
abilities.description: Transforms the Tinker into a Robo-Goblin. Increases collision size from 24 to 32, has Demolish (bonus damage to buildings). Provides bonus STR and armor.

abilities.name: Healing Spray
abilities.description: Sprays a flask of healing mist that heals units in a target area over multiple waves.

abilities.name: Chemical Rage
abilities.description: Causes the Alchemist's Ogre to enter a chemically induced rage, increasing movement and attack rate.

abilities.name: Acid Bomb
abilities.description: Hurls a flask of acid at a target. The flask breaks upon impact, splashing a powerful acid on nearby hostile units. Decreases armor and deals magic damage (less to secondary targets).

abilities.name: Transmute
abilities.description: Instantly kills an enemy unit, transforming it into liquid gold added to your available gold. Only works on units with Resistant Skin or creeps up to a certain level.
